summary: Comprehensive testing of Invoice Generator app completed. All backend APIs (14/14 tests) and frontend UI flows tested successfully. App is fully functional with minor timing issue on Saved tab initial load.

issues: Console warnings about deprecated 'shadow*' style props - should migrate to 'boxShadow' (React Native web compatibility warning, not critical)

timing_issues.issue: Invoices may not appear immediately on first navigation to Saved tab - requires ~2 second wait for API fetch to complete
timing_issues.note: This is expected behavior as data is fetched on tab focus. Pull-to-refresh works correctly.

test_categories.invoice_crud: ✓ All CRUD operations working (create, read, update, delete)
test_categories.pdf_generation: ✓ PDF generation working, returns base64 encoded PDF
test_categories.email_integration: ✓ Resend email integration working, sends invoice with PDF attachment
test_categories.validation: ✓ Proper 404 responses for nonexistent resources, 422 for validation errors

frontend_test_results.splash_screen: ✓ Appears at root URL, auto-redirects to create tab after ~2.2 seconds

create_tab.form_sections: ✓ All form sections present (Company Details, Invoice To, Invoice Details, Bank Details, Line Items)
create_tab.all_fields_working: ✓ All input fields functional with proper testID attributes
create_tab.totals_calculation: ✓ Real-time totals calculation accurate (tested: 10*150=1500, GST=150, Total=1650)
create_tab.save_button: ✓ Save invoice button works, creates invoice in backend

preview_tab.data_display: ✓ All invoice data shown (company, client, line items, totals, bank details)
preview_tab.download_pdf: ✓ Download PDF button present and functional
preview_tab.email_invoice: ✓ Email Invoice button opens modal with recipient, subject, message fields

saved_tab.invoice_list: ✓ Shows list of saved invoices with invoice number, client, amount, date
saved_tab.load_invoice: ✓ Clicking invoice loads it and navigates to preview
saved_tab.delete_button: ✓ Delete button present on each invoice card
saved_tab.new_invoice_button: ✓ New Invoice button present and functional

frontend_test_results.tab_navigation: ✓ Navigation between Create, Preview, Saved tabs working smoothly

integration_tests.create_to_save_flow: ✓ Full flow from creating invoice to saving works correctly
integration_tests.save_to_preview_flow: ✓ After saving, invoice appears in preview with 'Saved' badge
integration_tests.saved_to_load_flow: ✓ Loading invoice from Saved tab populates preview correctly
integration_tests.backend_frontend_sync: ✓ Data syncs correctly between frontend state and backend API

action_items: Consider migrating from deprecated 'shadow*' style props to 'boxShadow' for React Native web compatibility (low priority)
Optional: Add loading indicator on Saved tab while fetching invoices to improve UX
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All API endpoints use correct URL from environment variable (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL)
✓ MongoDB _id properly excluded from API responses
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✓ Totals calculation logic correct in both backend and frontend
✓ Resend email integration properly configured and working
✓ Error handling present for API calls
✓ Proper use of async/await for API calls
seed_data_creation: Test invoice created during testing: TEST_UI_001 (ID: e462e6ae-4f7f-403f-93ef-e55c16580d4d). One pre-existing invoice: 001 (ID: 9514ce97-616d-4dc4-b5af-c5b7f1a945d5)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. All backend APIs working correctly with proper validation and error handling. Frontend UI is responsive and all features work as expected. Resend email integration is live and working. Minor console warnings about deprecated style props can be addressed in future iteration but don't affect functionality.

additional_notes.mobile_first: ✓ App is mobile-responsive with proper touch targets
additional_notes.no_auth: ✓ No authentication required as per requirements
additional_notes.pdf_quality: ✓ PDF generation produces professional-looking invoices with proper formatting
additional_notes.email_functionality: ✓ Email sends with PDF attachment, HTML formatted body with invoice details

known_limitations.resend_email: Resend API key (re_dXxNwyxv_F4qugfjbfg3e3aVneokEyp4Z) is in test mode and can only send emails to verified address: lochandayanand05@gmail.com. To send to other recipients, domain verification is required at resend.com/domains. This is a Resend account limitation, not an app bug. The app correctly handles and displays the error message from Resend.
